verses.1: In You, LORD, I have taken refuge; Let me never be put to shame.
verses.2: In Your righteousness rescue me and save me; Extend Your ear to me and help me.
verses.3: Be to me a rock of dwelling to which I may continually come; You have given the commandment to save me, For You are my rock and my fortress.
verses.4: Save me, my God, from the hand of the wicked, From the grasp of the wrongdoer and the ruthless,
verses.5: For You are my hope; Lord GOD, You are my confidence from my youth.
verses.6: I have leaned on you since my birth; You are He who took me from my mother’s womb; My praise is continually of You.
verses.7: I have become a marvel to many, For You are my strong refuge.
verses.8: My mouth is filled with Your praise And with Your glory all day long.
verses.9: Do not cast me away at the time of my old age; Do not abandon me when my strength fails.
verses.10: For my enemies have spoken against me; And those who watch for my life have consulted together,
verses.11: Saying, “God has abandoned him; Pursue and seize him, for there is no one to save him. ”
verses.12: God, do not be far from me; My God, hurry to my aid!
verses.13: May those who are enemies of my soul be put to shame and consumed; May they be covered with disgrace and dishonor, who seek to injure me.
verses.14: But as for me, I will wait continually, And will praise You yet more and more.
verses.15: My mouth shall tell of Your righteousness And of Your salvation all day long; For I do not know the art of writing.
verses.16: I will come with the mighty deeds of the Lord GOD; I will make mention of Your righteousness, Yours alone.
verses.17: God, You have taught me from my youth, And I still declare Your wondrous deeds.
verses.18: And even when I am old and gray, God, do not abandon me, Until I declare Your strength to this generation, Your power to all who are to come.
verses.19: For Your righteousness, God, reaches to the heavens, You who have done great things; God, who is like You?
verses.20: You who have shown me many troubles and distresses Will revive me again, And will bring me up again from the depths of the earth.
verses.21: May You increase my greatness And turn to comfort me.
verses.22: I will also praise You with a harp, And Your truth, my God; I will sing praises to You with the lyre, Holy One of Israel.
verses.23: My lips will shout for joy when I sing praises to You; And my soul, which You have redeemed.
verses.24: My tongue also will tell of Your righteousness all day long; For they are put to shame, for they are humiliated who seek my harm.
